items.title: Baptiste saves 6 match points to stun Sabalenka
items.summary: American Hailey Baptiste earned the biggest win of her career by saving six match points and beating world No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka at the Madrid Open on Tuesday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: VAR review: Were Bayern wronged by PSG penalty awa...
items.summary: PSG were awarded a potentially decisive penalty for a Bayern Munich handball in a match for the ages.

items.title: 2026 WNBA Title Odds: Liberty Hold Steady As Favorites, Aces Move Up
items.summary: The Liberty are holding steady as the favorites but the reigning champs are moving up. Here are the latest WNBA title odds, with the new season on the horizon.
